text: No Deal: U.S.-Iran peace talks in Islamabad fall through - NPR
fullText: The United States and Iran failed to reach an agreement after a day of highly anticipated face-to-face peace talks, Washington's lead negotiator Vice President J.D. Vance announced on Sunday.

text: This Masters is suddenly and surprisingly no longer Rory McIlroy’s victory lap - Golf Channel
fullText: On a record Saturday of scoring at Augusta National, McIlroy fought just to keep the wheels on, losing his six-shot lead and now finding himself tied with Cameron Young entering Sunday.

text: UFC 327 results: Carlos Ulberg shockingly KOs Jiri Prochazka to win title on one leg after blowing out knee - Yahoo Sports
fullText: Ulberg is the new light heavyweight champion after starching Prochazka in one of the wildest scenes in recent UFC history.

text: Man with machete fatally shot at NYC's Grand Central after slashing attack, NYPD says - CBS News
fullText: A man with a machete slashed and injured three people at Grand Central in New York City before he was fatally shot by police, the NYPD said.

text: An AI started and employed an entire store with $100,000. It screwed up with staffing on day one. - Business Insider
fullText: Andon Labs let an AI loose with $100,000 to start a small store in San Francisco.

text: #C11ampions: Denver Wins Record 11th National Championship - University of Denver Athletics
fullText: LAS VEGAS - The University of Denver Pioneers hockey program came from behind to win in the third period to win its NCAA record 11th national championship after a 2-1 win over Wisconsin on Saturday afternoon at T-Mobile Arena.

text: Artemis II’s moon-traveling astronauts return home to cheers after a record-breaking trip - AP News
fullText: Artemis II's moon-traveling astronauts are back home and feted to a thunderous welcome. Still marveling over their record-breaking lunar fly-around, the crew of four flew to Houston's Ellington Field from San Diego on Saturday afternoon. After a quick reunion…

text: Trump touts newly released plans for D.C. triumphal arch - NPR

text: Lebanese bury 13 officers killed by Israel as grief and outrage surge ahead of talks in the US - AP News

text: ‘Close to midnight’: Alleged Sam Altman firebomber wrote of fears AI would end humanity - San Francisco Chronicle

text: How much sway does Trump have over Hungarian voters? - DW.com
fullText: US President Trump has backed Hungarian PM Orban. It's unclear whether the endorsement will help in Hungary's election — the European hard-right has struggled with Trump's recent anti-Europe policies and threats.
